title: santolina millefolium
intro: Santolina millefolium, also known as Cotton Lavender or Lavender Cotton, is a perennial shrubby herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and fungal infections. The health benefits of Santolina millefolium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to digestive problems.
